main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative degradation por chloramines + GAC exhaustion' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Cease RO operation + replace GAC both vessels + integrity test + replace damaged elements — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide TOC o UV254 post-GAC para adsorption capacity — discriminador parcial. Match parcial.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: si conductividad sube con ΔP → fouling switch.
